member.name: T:HbarUnit
member.summary:
Common units of hbar; for the most part they follow SI prefix conventions.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: P:HbarUnit.Tinybar
member.summary: Gets the number of tinybar in this unit.

member.name: P:HbarUnit.Symbol
member.summary: Gets the preferred symbol of the current unit (e.g., "tℏ").

member.name: M:HbarUnit.ToString
member.summary: Returns the unit name in lowercase (mimics Java toString() override).
